      // SPECTRAUI-70823: Do not use partial digest when preview from VBS
      const rwdQueryString = window.location.search;
      const rwdUrlParams = new URLSearchParams(rwdQueryString);
      const vbdtPreferExtVer = rwdUrlParams.get('vbdt:preferExtensionVersion');
      if (window.faConfig?.PROFILE?.ORA_VB_PARTIAL_DIGEST_ENABLED === 'Y' && !vbdtPreferExtVer) {
        const { APP_NAME } = window.vbInitConfig;
        if (APP_NAME) {
          const { pathname } = window.location;
          const appUrl = pathname.substring(pathname.indexOf(APP_NAME));
          if (appUrl) {
            const appUi = appUrl.split('/')[1];
            if (appUi && appUi.length > 0 && appUi !== 'redwoodHome') {
              const currentDigestId = window.vbInitConfig?.REGISTRY_DIGEST_VERSION || 'latest';
                window.vbInitConfig.DIGEST_PROMISE = fetch(`${window.vbInitConfig.REGISTRY_URL}vxmanifest/v2/partialDigest/${currentDigestId}?appRoute=${appUi}`);
            }
          }
        }
      }
    </script>
